issue_title: Styles aren't included when view encapsulation is turned off
issue_body_preview: I have view encapsulation globally disabled for my application. When I include loading bar in my root component, its content is visible in DOM but I can't see it visually because no styling is applied to its content. After investigating the problem for some time I have tried to turn view encapsulati
test_description_zh: 在 Angular 应用中全局关闭视图封装（ViewEncapsulation.None），在根组件中引入 ngx-loading-bar 加载条组件，触发一个 HTTP 请求或手动启动加载条，观察加载条是否在页面顶部可见并带有正确的样式。
expected_result_zh: 加载条在页面顶部正常显示，具有正确的高度、颜色和动画样式，即使在全局关闭 ViewEncapsulation 的情况下，加载条的样式也能正确应用并可见。
